Notice And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons On Jing Tang Liu
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 3T HERBTECH INC. Motion to Quash Service of Summons and Complaint on Jing Tang Liu. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Plaintiff fails to meet its evidentiary burden by demonstrating that the San Gabriel address is Liu's "usual place of business" or "usual mailing address." (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Continued To Nov-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 3T HERBTECH INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Gary Hollingsworth, Esq., Law Offices of Gary Hollingsworth (626) 292-2626. Counsel failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 3T HERBTECH INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. First Amended Complaint filed on July 15, 2009. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
